title: Pelexia loefgrenii
taxonomy: Pelexia loefgrenii is a species of orchid native to South America. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The genus Pelexia is a small group of orchids that are typically terrestrial and found in tropical regions. Pelexia loefgrenii is further classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Its classification is also reflected in the International Plant Names Index, where it is listed as a valid species of orchid.
uses: I couldn't find any information on the medicinal uses of Pelexia loefgrenii.
intro: There is limited information on Pelexia loefgrenii.
